source_papers.title: English version of Japanese guidance for the use of oral Janus kinase inhibitors (<scp>JAK1</scp> and <scp>TYK2</scp> inhibitors) in the treatments of psoriasis
Selectivity Profile of the Tyrosine Kinase 2 Inhibitor Deucravacitinib Compared with Janus Kinase 1/2/3 Inhibitors
Intestinal Epithelial Cell Tyrosine Kinase 2 Transduces IL-22 Signals To Protect from Acute Colitis

scoring.formula: score = min((log(ab+1) + log(bc+1)) * novelty / 10, 1.0); novelty = 1.0 if direct==0 else 0.7 / (direct+1)
